lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm sorry to bother you, but could you spare me a little dung?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: If I go near that camel, it'll probably bite my hand off.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Mmm... looks like that camel would make a nice kebab.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I wonder if that camel has fleas...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm sorry to bother you, but could you spare me a little dung?

lines.speaker: Elly the Camel
lines.text: Are you serious?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh yes. If you'd be so kind...

lines.speaker: Elly the Camel
lines.text: I'm sorry, but I can't really help you right now. Perhaps you should ask me again later, or try a different camel.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Fair enough.

lines.speaker: Elly the Camel
lines.text: Well, just you close your eyes first. I'm not doing it while you're watching me!

lines.speaker: Elly the Camel
lines.text: I hope that's what you wanted!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ohhh yes. Lovely.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: If I go near that camel, it'll probably bite my hand off.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Mmm... looks like that camel would make a nice kebab.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I wonder if that camel has fleas...

lines.speaker: Elly the Camel
lines.text: Did you say something?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, er, nothing important.

lines.speaker: Elly the Camel
lines.text: Well, it's nice to have someone to talk to.

lines.speaker: Elly the Camel
lines.text: Ollie is so remote, and I can't get up the courage to talk to him...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who's Ollie?

lines.speaker: Elly the Camel
lines.text: He's the camel wandering around near that glider.

lines.speaker: Elly the Camel
lines.text: Isn't he so strong-looking and handsome?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Er... he just looks like any other camel to me.

lines.speaker: Elly the Camel
lines.text: How can you not see how wonderful he is?

lines.speaker: Elly the Camel
lines.text: Why, he can cross the Kharidian Desert in three bounds, and he's so strong that he could haul the brick for the Emir's Arena in only a day!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You're a camel, I'm not. Maybe you can see these things better.

lines.speaker: Elly the Camel
lines.text: For someone who understands camel speech, you're not good at these things.
